metadata.title: Timing a Perfect Mid Peek to Secure a Clean Double Kill in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch a sharp moment where quick reflexes and smart positioning turn a 2v1 into a flawless double kill. What’s your go-to play when holding mid?
